subject: [PATCH v8 1/2] firmware_loader: add search_path= module option for multi-path firmware lookup

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a new module option called firmware_class.search_path that allows users to specify multiple paths for firmware lookup. The input is preprocessed at boot or sysfs write time into a NUL-separated sequence of paths, avoiding per-load parsing overhead. The firmware lookup order is first the legacy path specified by firmware_class.path, then the colon-separated paths from search_path, and finally built-in default paths. Backslash escapes are supported for literal ':' and '\
